---
title: "dispatcher.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/commands/dispatcher.ts"
loc: 45
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.93
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 2.89
overall_score: 4.11
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [parse](file://node:path)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [execa](file://execa)

### Exports
- `registerDispatcher`
- `registerDispatcher`
- `discoverAll`
- `commands`
- `scriptDirs`
- `name`
- `cmd`
- `allCmds`
- `pythonPath`
- `dispatcherPath`
